name: Traptrix Allomerus
name_jp: アロメルスの<ruby lang="jp"><rb>蟲</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>こ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>惑</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>わく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>魔</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ま</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc:
2+ Level 4 monsters
Unaffected by Trap effects while it has material. You can only use each of the following effects of "Traptrix Allomerus" once per turn.
● You can detach 2 materials from this card; Special Summon 1 Level 4 Insect or Plant monster from your GY.
● If an opponent's monster(s) leaves the field because of your card effect, and is now in the GY or banished (except during the Damage Step): You can detach 1 material from this card, then target 1 of them; Special Summon it to your field.

jp_sets.set: Structure Deck: Forest of the Traptrix
Structure Deck: Forest of the Traptrix - The Legend of Duelist Quarter Century Edition

action: Activates if other cards leave the field
Detaches multiple Xyz Materials as cost
Applies effects if Xyz Material is attached
summoning: Does not require specific Xyz Materials
Special Summons from your opponent's Graveyard to your field
Special Summons the opponent's banished monsters to the player's field
